name: pr_review
description: Unattended PR review pipeline: audits the diff for security and logic issues, converges the findings, applies fixes, runs the test suite, and merges once green. If the test suite still fails after a fix pass, loops back to the fixer (capped) instead of asking a human.

variables.description: The PR identifier to review, e.g. from a run request like 'run pr review for PR #482'.
Security issues found in the diff (injection, auth/authz, secrets, unsafe deserialization, SSRF, path traversal, vulnerable dependencies, etc.), one per line with file, line, severity, and the issue.

Logic/correctness issues found in the same diff (off-by-one errors, incorrect conditionals, missing edge cases, race conditions, broken control flow, incorrect state mutations, etc.), one per line with file, line, severity, and the issue.
security_findings and logic_findings merged into one deduplicated, severity-ordered list of actionable issues.
Whether converged_findings contains at least one actionable issue.
Number of fix/test cycles run so far in this review.
Whether the test suite passed on the most recent run.
Which tests failed and why, from the most recent test run; guides the next fix pass.

settings.action: Fetch full diff: `gh pr diff <pr_number>`. Retain for audit steps.

Audit diff for security vulnerabilities: injection, auth/authz gaps, hardcoded secrets, unsafe deserialization, SSRF, path traversal, insecure dependency use, OWASP-class issues. Write each finding to security_findings with file, line, severity, description. Empty if none found.

Audit same diff for logic/correctness issues: off-by-one errors, incorrect conditionals, missing/mishandled edge cases, race conditions, broken control flow, incorrect state mutations. Write each finding to logic_findings with file, line, severity, description. Empty if none found.

Merge security_findings and logic_findings into converged_findings: dedupe, drop non-actionable issues, sort by severity (highest first). Set findings_present=true if converged_findings has ≥1 issue, else false.

Increment fix_iteration by 1. First pass: fix every issue in converged_findings, minimal correct change per issue. Later pass (test_output non-empty): fix only what test_output reports failing. No unrelated changes.
Run project test suite. All pass: set tests_passed=true, clear test_output. Otherwise: set tests_passed=false, write failed tests and why to test_output.
Test suite passes. Merge: `gh pr merge <pr_number> --squash`. Set merged=true. Post summary of converged findings fixed before merging.

Fix/test cycle cap (3 iterations) reached without tests passing. Do not merge. Set merged=false. Write escalation report: converged_findings, fixes attempted per iteration, last test_output, for human handoff.
